name: BACKUP MONITOR ULTIMATE: Verificacion Diaria (04:00 AM)

parameters.command: echo '===DB_BACKUP==='; ls -lht /data/agencia/backups/db/ 2>/dev/null | head -5; echo ''; echo '===LATEST_DB==='; LATEST=$(ls -t /data/agencia/backups/db/pg_full_*.sql.gz 2>/dev/null | head -1); if [ -n "$LATEST" ]; then echo "File: $LATEST"; echo "Size: $(stat -c%s "$LATEST" 2>/dev/null || echo 'unknown') bytes"; echo "Age: $(( ($(date +%s) - $(stat -c%Y "$LATEST" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)) / 3600 )) hours"; else echo 'NO DB BACKUP FOUND'; fi; echo ''; echo '===WF_BACKUP==='; ls -lht /data/agencia/backups/workflows/ 2>/dev/null | head -5; echo ''; echo '===LATEST_WF==='; LATEST_WF=$(ls -t /data/agencia/backups/workflows/workflows_*.json.gz 2>/dev/null | head -1); if [ -n "$LATEST_WF" ]; then echo "File: $LATEST_WF"; echo "Size: $(stat -c%s "$LATEST_WF" 2>/dev/null || echo 'unknown') bytes"; echo "Age: $(( ($(date +%s) - $(stat -c%Y "$LATEST_WF" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)) / 3600 )) hours"; else echo 'NO WF BACKUP FOUND'; fi; echo ''; echo '===DISK_USAGE==='; du -sh /data/agencia/backups/ 2>/dev/null; echo ''; echo '===BACKUP_LOG==='; tail -10 /var/log/aurenix-backup.log 2>/dev/null || echo 'No log file'

parameters.text:
=🔴 *BACKUP MONITOR — ALERTA*

{{ $json.errors.map((e, i) => `${i+1}. ${e}`).join('\n') }}

*DB Age:* {{ $json.dbAge }}h
*DB Size:* {{ $json.dbSize }} bytes

Revisa el cron: `crontab -l`
Log: `tail -20 /var/log/aurenix-backup.log`

parameters.fileContent: ={{ JSON.stringify({ timestamp: new Date().toISOString(), status: $json.status, dbAge: $json.dbAge, dbSize: $json.dbSize, errors: $json.errors }) }}
